name: register_simulator
short_description: Register specified simulator with Vivado application
full_help:
register_simulator

Description: 
Register specified simulator with Vivado application

Syntax: 
register_simulator  -description <arg> [-bootstrap <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]
                    <name>

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  -description  Specify a short description of the simulator
  [-bootstrap]  Specify the command to 'load' a Tcl app or source a Tcl 
                script
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>        Specify the name of the simulator to register

Categories: 
ToolLaunch, Simulation

arguments.description: Specify a short description of the simulator
Specify the command to 'load' a Tcl app or source a Tcl script
